sql_array: CREATE TABLE prices (id INT PRIMARY KEY, price1 FLOAT, price2 FLOAT, price3 FLOAT);
SELECT __min(price1, price2, price3) - 5 AS adjusted_min FROM prices;
SELECT p.id, __min(p.price1, p.price2, p.price3) AS min_value FROM prices p GROUP BY p.id HAVING min_value < 10;
SELECT __min(SELECT price1 FROM prices) - __min(SELECT price3 FROM prices) AS price_diff;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE price_summaries AS SELECT id, price1 + price2 + price3 AS total_price FROM prices;
SELECT __min(total_price) AS min_total FROM price_summaries WHERE total_price IS NOT NULL;
SELECT __min(price1/NULLIF(price3,0), price2) AS min_value_with_nulls FROM prices;
SELECT __min(NULL, price1 - 2) AS min_minus_two FROM prices WHERE price1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT price1, (SELECT __min(price2) FROM prices WHERE price1 > 0) - price3 AS adjusted_min FROM prices;
SELECT __min(CAST(price1 AS VARCHAR), CAST(price2 AS VARCHAR)) FROM prices;
